Jira Customer Service Desk

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”]The Jira Customer Service Desk provides access to dedicated Service Desks for Aptio, MegaRAC, Tektagon and AMI Data Center Manager, depending on active contract terms. For assistance with access issues, please contact your AMI Sales Representative.

Access Jira Customer Service Desk  →[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section]
